name: Holo Scan
summary: One universal block explorer for 27 networks verifiable, in the browser.

description.p: Exploring a chain shouldn't mean trusting one explorer's servers.
It reads real on-chain data across 25 EVM chains plus Solana and Hyperliquid, verifying results by content in the browser.

ul: Address, transaction, block and token views

releases.description: Renamed Holo Scan. Universal multi-chain explorer (27 networks: EVM + Solana + Hyperliquid HyperCore) with a Blockscout-style branded hero per chain logo, accent, concise metadata and official/social links over real data, in-browser κ / ed25519 verification (Law L5).
Blockscout-grade, Etherscan-identical, multi-chain explorer over real data (Blockscout API v2) with in-browser keccak256/RLP κ-verification of every block & transaction (Law L5).
